### 📋 CLIP A1 — WAYNE (Cold Open Hook)

THIS IS THE SCRIPT:
Wayne says: The most powerful weight loss drug ever tested just dropped Phase Three data. What they are not telling you could wreck your body.

THIS IS THE VIDEO PROMPT:
Standing against pure black background Medium close-up framing from chest up. Camera pushes in slowly toward face. Intense direct eye contact. No subtitles.
```

THIS IS THE VIDEO PROMPT:

card
```
Photorealistic close-up of a weathered construction builder license card sitting on rough concrete. Golden hour side-lighting. Shallow depth of field against pure black background. 16:9.
```

### B3 — TRIUMPH trial document
```
Photorealistic overhead shot of a medical research document with TRIUMPH printed as the header scattered on a dark matte surface. Blue accent lighting from the side. 16:9.
```

### B4 — Triple receptor molecular diagram
```
Photorealistic 3D render of three glowing receptor proteins side by side labeled GLP-1 GIP GLUCAGON floating in pure black space. Blue green and amber bioluminescent glow. 16:9.
```

### B5 — Demolition of load-bearing wall
```
Photorealistic wide shot of a construction demolition crew removing a structural concrete wall from a modern building interior. Dust particles in golden light. Pure black shadows. 16:9.
```

### B6 — Mounjaro injection pen
```
Photorealistic extreme close-up of a tirzepatide autoinjection pen lying on a dark granite countertop. Soft clinical lighting. Shallow depth of field. 16:9.
```

### B7 — Molecule comparison chart
```
Photorealistic digital display showing a side-by-side molecular comparison chart. Semaglutide versus tirzepatide versus retatrutide. Glowing blue data lines on black. 16:9.
```

### B8 — Cracking concrete foundation
```
Photorealistic close-up of a hairline crack spreading through a gray concrete foundation wall. Dramatic side-lighting revealing the fracture depth. Pure black background. 16:9.
```

### B9 — DEXA body scan display
```
Photorealistic close-up of a DEXA scan monitor showing a full body composition readout with fat mass and lean mass percentages highlighted in red and blue. Dark clinical room. 16:9.
```

### B10 — Weight loss trial bar chart
```
Photorealistic 3D bar chart floating in black space showing descending weight loss percentages. Clean modern data design with glowing blue bars. 16:9.
```

### B11 — Clinical enrollment document
```
Photorealistic close-up of hands holding a clinical trial enrollment form with TRIUMPH-4 header. Soft overhead lighting on dark desk surface. 16:9.
```

### B12 — Pharmaceutical balance scale
```
Photorealistic close-up of a balance scale with pharmaceutical vials on each side. One side labeled DUAL and the other TRIPLE. Dark matte surface. Dramatic side-lighting. 16:9.
```

### B13 — Building furnace boiler
```
Photorealistic wide shot of an industrial building boiler system with glowing orange flames visible through an inspection window. Dark industrial space steam rising. 16:9.
```

### B14 — Glucagon molecule
```
Photorealistic 3D render of a glucagon peptide molecule with a warm amber glow floating against pure black space. Scientific visualization. 16:9.
```

### B15 — Steak and protein meal
```
Photorealistic overhead shot of a high-protein meal thick grilled steak six scrambled eggs and a protein shake on a dark slate plate. Dramatic overhead lighting. 16:9.
```

### B16 — Protein powder scoop
```
Photorealistic extreme close-up of a silver scoop filled with white whey protein powder being lifted from a dark container. Powder particles catching light. 16:9.
```

### B17 — DEXA muscle loss scan
```
Photorealistic medical monitor displaying a DEXA scan with red highlighted areas showing lean mass reduction in the limbs and torso. Dark clinical room. 16:9.
```

### B18 — Rebar inside formwork
```
Photorealistic close-up of steel rebar grid inside wooden concrete formwork on a construction site. Dramatic side-lighting. The rebar is partially removed showing the structural gap. 16:9.
```

### B19 — Body composition silhouette
```
Photorealistic side-by-side silhouette of a male figure. Left side shows surface weight loss. Right side shows internal muscle mass depletion. X-ray style visualization against black. 16:9.
```

### B20 — Structural shoring supports
```
Photorealistic wide shot of temporary steel shoring posts supporting a building floor during renovation. Industrial lighting. Construction site interior. 16:9.
```

### B21 — Building blueprint annotations
```
Photorealistic overhead shot of architectural blueprints spread on a dark concrete surface with a red pen circling the foundation section. Golden hour side-lighting. 16:9.
```

### B22 — Raw steak and eggs
```
Photorealistic extreme close-up of raw marbled ribeye steak next to farm-fresh eggs on a dark cutting board. Rich colors against black background. Dramatic lighting. 16:9.
```

### B23 — Protein shake pour
```
Photorealistic slow-motion capture of a thick chocolate protein shake being poured into a dark glass. Liquid detail visible. Black background. 16:9.
```

### B24 — Barbell back squat
```
Photorealistic close-up of a loaded barbell on muscular shoulders during a back squat. Gym chalk dust in the air. Dark gym with dramatic overhead lighting. 16:9.
```

### B25 — Barbell deadlift
```
Photorealistic low-angle shot of hands gripping a heavy loaded barbell from the floor. Chalk dust. Dark industrial gym. Dramatic upward lighting. 16:9.
```

### B26 — Overhead press lockout
```
Photorealistic medium shot of a loaded barbell locked out overhead. Muscular forearms visible. Dark gym background with single spotlight. 16:9.
```

### B27 — BPC-157 vial
```
Photorealistic extreme close-up of a small glass vial containing white lyophilized powder labeled BPC-157. Sitting on a dark laboratory surface. Clean clinical lighting. 16:9.
```

### B28 — Tendon fiber repair
```
Photorealistic scientific visualization of collagen tendon fibers being repaired at the cellular level. Glowing blue and gold fibers weaving together against black. 16:9.
```

### B29 — Mortar on brick
```
Photorealistic close-up of a mason trowel spreading fresh mortar between brick courses. Warm golden light. Construction detail. 16:9.
```

### B30 — Preclinical research papers
```
Photorealistic overhead shot of scattered medical research papers with a bright yellow sticky note reading PRECLINICAL prominently placed on top. Dark desk surface. 16:9.
```

### B31 — Stethoscope consultation
```
Photorealistic close-up of a physician stethoscope resting on a dark desk next to a prescription pad. Soft warm lighting. Medical professionalism. 16:9.
```

### B32 — Four pillars checklist
```
Photorealistic close-up of a dark clipboard with four items checked off in green PROTEIN RESISTANCE TISSUE REPAIR COLLAGEN. Clean typography on dark surface. 16:9.
```

### B33 — GHK-Cu vial
```
Photorealistic extreme close-up of a small amber glass vial labeled GHK-Cu with copper-colored liquid inside. Dark matte surface. Warm accent lighting. 16:9.
```

### B34 — Skin texture comparison
```
Photorealistic split-screen close-up of facial skin texture. Left side shows loose lax skin. Right side shows firm tightened skin. Clinical lighting against black. 16:9.
```

### B35 — Four concrete pillars
```
Photorealistic wide shot of four tall concrete structural pillars supporting a modern building ceiling. Clean industrial architecture. Dramatic upward perspective. 16:9.
```

### B36 — Concrete quality inspection
```
Photorealistic close-up of a construction inspector examining a concrete core sample with a testing gauge. Hard hat and safety vest visible. Job site lighting. 16:9.
```

### B37 — Search trends graph
```
Photorealistic digital screen showing an explosive upward trending search graph for peptide searches. Blue line going vertical against dark interface. 16:9.
```

### B38 — Peptide lab test
```
Photorealistic close-up of a laboratory technician holding a peptide vial under a mass spectrometry analysis machine. Clinical blue lighting. Dark lab. 16:9.
```

### B39 — Construction scaffolding
```
